'''Matra VI''' was a relatively isolated [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. It was a successful industrial world, and was populated largely by [[Alien/Legends|non-Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. These aliens were drawn by the potential for a new life in the Corporate Sector, away from the predations of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. While the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] was often just as harsh with non-[[Human/Legends|Humans]], on Matra VI many of them managed to grow quite rich, while still remaining removed from the upper echelons of the world's highly stratified society.

The [[Gunslinger/Legends|gunslinger]] [[Gallandro/Legends|Gallandro]] lured and then [[Death/Legends|killed]] the [[Malorm family]] on Matra VI after their raid on the ''[[Galaxy Wanderer]]''. It was also one of a number of planets where [[Roa]] encountered his fellow refugee [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{Mo}}
